# Pull Request Policy

Thanks for wanting to help. This project uses an issue-first contribution model.

Unrequested pull requests are not accepted for catalog edits, source-ledger edits, or troubleshooting guidance. Please open one of the issue templates instead so maintainers can review the source evidence and make the curated change.

## Maintainer-Requested PRs Only

Check the box below only if a maintainer explicitly asked you to open this pull request.

- [ ] A maintainer requested this pull request.

Related issue:

## Scope

Describe the maintainer-requested change:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint:data`
- [ ] `npm run lint:launch`
- [ ] `npm run smoke`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run render:check`
